description: Epic-level PRD to redesign and harden the Projects section into a high-converting, accessible, modal-first showcase with richer discovery, filtering, detail views, and measurable UX quality improvements.

inScope: Projects section information architecture and interaction model
Project detail modal (no new route) aligned with modal-first architecture
Data model improvements for projects metadata
Motion and micro-interactions with reduced-motion compliance
Performance hardening for images and rendering
outOfScope: Creating new SEO routes/pages for project details
Replacing existing portfolio owner profile content
Adding unrelated sections or redesigning header/footer

architecture: Modal-first pattern is mandatory for expanded project detail views
No additional routes for project details
Use existing Tailwind token classes for light/dark compatibility
Use data from portfolio-resources/data/projects.json as source of truth
qualityGates: No accessibility regressions for keyboard-only users

existingFoundation.projectSection: src/components/sections/ProjectsSection.tsx - featured card + compact list + View all/Show less toggle
existingFoundation.stylingAndMotion: Tailwind + Framer Motion patterns already used across sections

successMetrics.ux: Users can discover a project within 2 interactions using search/filter/sort
successMetrics.a11y: All project interactions keyboard accessible with clear focus states and semantic labels
successMetrics.performance: No noticeable layout shifts in Projects section; image rendering optimized for mobile and desktop
successMetrics.quality: Lint/build/test gates pass with zero failures
successMetrics.consistency: Projects section follows portfolio design tokens and modal-first rules
successMetrics.maintainability: PRD-driven implementation documented and linked in copilot instructions

stories.title: Data Model Upgrade for Project Metadata
acceptanceCriteria: Extend Project type in src/types/index.ts for richer metadata (category, role, impactMetrics, featuredRank, status, and optional gallery)
Update portfolio-resources/data/projects.json with non-placeholder real metadata only
Keep backward compatibility for existing fields: title, image, description, repositoryURL, liveURL, processURL, tags, year
Ensure src/data/projects.ts compiles without unsafe casts
Document optional vs required fields clearly in PRD/progress updates

technicalNotes.risk: Type drift between JSON data and TS interfaces

stories.title: ProjectsSection Discovery Layer (Search + Filters + Sort)
acceptanceCriteria: Add client-side keyword search by title, description, and tags
Add filter chips/selectors for category and tech tags
Add sort options (newest, oldest, featured, A-Z)
Display active filter state and total result count
Provide one-click reset for all filters
Preserve existing View all/Show less behavior when no filters are active

technicalNotes.state: Prefer memoized derived state for filtered/sorted list

stories.title: Project Detail Modal (Modal-First Expansion)
acceptanceCriteria: Create ProjectDetailModal in src/components/ui using existing Modal wrapper
Open modal from featured and list cards using a clear CTA (e.g., View Details)
Render extended details: summary, stack, role, impact metrics, and links
Modal supports ESC close, backdrop close, and explicit close button
No new page routes introduced

technicalNotes.architecture: Must follow existing modal registration pattern

stories.title: Visual Polish and Motion System for Projects
acceptanceCriteria: Enhance card hover/focus micro-interactions with consistent timings
Add staggered reveal for filtered results without layout jitter
Respect prefers-reduced-motion across section interactions
Maintain theme token compliance in light and dark modes

technicalNotes.motion: Use Framer Motion patterns already used in other sections

stories.title: Accessibility Hardening for Projects Interactions
acceptanceCriteria: Ensure all interactive controls are keyboard reachable and operable
Add/verify semantic labels for icon-only links and control buttons
Provide visible focus indicators on all project controls
Ensure modal content has logical heading order and screen-reader clarity
Validate that filter and sort controls announce state changes

stories.title: Performance Optimization for Project Media and Rendering
acceptanceCriteria: Audit Next/Image usage (sizes, priority, lazy loading) in project cards
Prevent layout shifts with explicit dimensions and stable containers
Avoid unnecessary re-renders for filtered/sorted lists
Keep interactions smooth on mobile under large tag sets

stories.title: Test Coverage Expansion for Projects Epic
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests for search, filters, sorting, and reset behavior
Add tests for opening/closing ProjectDetailModal
Add keyboard accessibility tests for core interactions
Update existing ProjectsSection tests to cover new states
All project-related tests pass in CI

stories.title: Documentation and Agent Loop Alignment
acceptanceCriteria: Update .github/copilot-instructions.md Ralph section to reference PRD-first execution
Document project epic status markers in progress tracking file if used
Keep instructions consistent with no-push autocommit policy
Ensure implementation steps map to PRD story IDs

technicalNotes.note: This story enables reliable autonomous execution and auditability
